Document:
# Core Rule 0 ## Players must be, and act, 16 or above to play Monolith.
[italic][color=yellow]If you are proven to be intentionally withholding information that a player is under 16 in Monolith, you may be banned under this rule.[/color][/italic]
- A player's real-life chronological age must be 16 years old to play the server. Secondly, [color=yellow]you must act as if you are 16 or above.[/color]
- Players with immature personalities [color=red]can be removed with admin discretion under this rule.[/color]
- Characters having, or implying, [color=pink]romantic relationships[/color] with other characters is [color=red]forbidden[/color]. You may have a romantic relationship outside the game with players, but bringing it into the server and mentioning it will be considered a rule break. -- Having an "off-screen" romantic relationship is [color=green]allowed[/color], mentioning you're married to [bold]Joe Yomama[/bold] is [color=green][bold]not[/bold][/color] a rulebreak unless it is a real character you are aware of.
